8. 
On 04.12.2019, the JMFC Panaji issued summons by recording the 
following :-
“Criminal Case No. LC/19/2019/C
Perused. 
The material on record makes out a prima facie case 
against the accused. Hence, issue process.”
9. 
Aggrieved, the respondent herein moved the High Court of Bombay 
at Goa seeking to quash and set aside the summons as well as the 
complaint, primarily on two grounds alleged namely, that the order 
issuing summons is unreasoned and suffers grave errors of facts and
